rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» - 6 стихир влкмч., Сл.: влкмч., І нині: богород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар влкмч., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря влкмч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. влкмч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар влкмч. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря влкмч. Катизми черг., сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон Октоїха і влкмч. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: світильний влкмч., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар влкмч., Сл., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря влкмч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. влкмч.
Часи: на 1-му – дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – влкмч.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – Кол. 256 зач.; 2, 20 – 3, 3. Єв. – Лк. 44 зач.; 9, 23-27.

troparion_en.text: Your holy martyr Artemios, O Lord, / through his sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion_en.text: Let us gather to sing worthy hymns in honor of Artemios, / the pious and victorious martyr who defeated his enemies: / He is great among martyrs and generous in performing miracles, / and he intercedes with the Lord on behalf of us all!

troparion.text: Your holy martyr Artemios, O Lord, / through his sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text: Let us gather to sing worthy hymns in honor of Artemios, / the pious and victorious martyr who defeated his enemies: / He is great among martyrs and generous in performing miracles, / and he intercedes with the Lord on behalf of us all!

troparion.text: By the will of the Almighty, Heaven was darkened by a stormcloud, /  lightning flashed, and in the threatening sound of thunder, /  you surrendered your soul into the hand of God, O most wise Artemios.  / And now you stand before the Throne of the Master of all,  / speedily granting healing to all who come to you with faith and love, /  and entreating Christ God that our souls may be saved.

oca_saints.name: Venerable Gerasimus the New Ascetic of Cephalonia

troparion.text:
Let us the faithful praise the divine Gerasimos, / who is the protector of the Orthodox, and an angel in the body,
and a newly appeared God-bearing wonderworker; / for he has worthily received from God the unfailing grace of
healing; / he restores the sick, and heals those possessed by demons; / therefore, he pours forth healings upon those who honor him.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “Today the Virgin...”)
Today the island of Cephalonia /  with sacred songs of thanksgiving, / calls upon all the Orthodox to extol the newly appeared boast and glory of Orthodoxy, /  the divine Gerasimos, / who is truly her deliverer and champion.

troparion.text: (Podoben: “Awed by the beauty of your virginity...”)Following in the footsteps of Christ, you forsook the pleasures of the world, O venerable one,  / and in the flesh you imitated the life of the angels.  / Therefore, you have filled Chios, your native isle, with joy,  / and with the gifts bestowed by the Spirit, O all-praised maiden.  / Therefore, we cry out to you with joy: “Rejoice, most blessed Matrona.”

oca_saints.name: The Uncovering of the Relics of the Hieromartyr Νikόdēmos, Bishop of Belgorod

troparion.text: With loud voices, let us glorify the zealot of Orthodoxy and piety,   /  the Hieromartyr Νikόdēmos and the Hierarch Joasaph, who gave his life for the sheep of Christ's flock;   /   pray to the all-merciful God for us   /  that He may strengthen our land in Orthodoxy with faith, hope and love,   /  and bestow great mercy on our souls.

kontakion.text: O chosen lamp of the land of Belgorod, you suffered martyrdom and death for the sake of Christ;  /  since you have received invincible grace, help us with your patronage in the establishment of Orthodoxy,  /  that we may cry out to you with faith: “Rejoice, Hieromartyr Νikόdēmos, Archpastor and zealous intercessor.”
